DeckVerified_FilterDescription_Verified: Show only games that work naturally with your Deck's built-in controls and display.
DeckVerified_FilterDescription_Verified_: Show only games that work naturally with Steam Deck's built-in controls and display.
Show all Verified titles, plus games that are playable but might require extra effort to interact with or configure.
Show all Verified and Playable titles, plus games that haven't yet been tested for Deck compatibility.
DeckVerified_FilterDescription_AllGames: Show all games in your library, including those that Steam Deck doesn't run well.
SteamOS_FilterDescription_Compatible: Include games that have been tested to support SteamOS
SteamOS_FilterDescription_Compatible_Unk: Include games that have been tested to support SteamOS, plus games that haven't yet been tested for SteamOS compatibility.
SteamOS_FilterDescription_AllGames: Show all games in your library, including those that SteamOS doesn't run well.
MachineVerified_FilterDescription_Verifi: Show only games that work naturally with Steam Machine.
Show all Verified titles, plus games that are playable but might require extra effort to interact with or configure.
Show all Verified and Playable titles, plus games that haven't yet been tested for Steam Machine compatibility.
MachineVerified_FilterDescription_AllGam: Show all games in your library, including those that Steam Machine doesn't run well.
